input.command: cat prompt.txt; echo "===PRECOND==="; cat precondition.log; echo "===PROXY==="; cat proxy.pid

content.content:
Enable TLS for the running MongoDB replica set.

The openssl-toolbox pod is available in the mongodb namespace to generate
certificates. Mount certificates into mongo-rs pods at /etc/tls with:

- /etc/tls/ca.crt
- /etc/tls/server.pem
- /etc/tls/client.pem

Plain (non-TLS) connections must fail after the change, and TLS connections
using the files above must succeed.===PRECOND===
[precondition:mongo_env_ready:preconditionUnits[0] 'mongo_env_ready':probe] $ kubectl -n mongodb get pod mongo-rs-0 2>/dev/null | grep -c Running
0

[precondition:mongo_env_ready:preconditionUnits[0] 'mongo_env_ready':apply] $ /bin/sh -c 'kubectl delete namespace mongodb --ignore-not-found=true; kubectl wait --for=delete namespace/mongodb --timeout=120s || true'
namespace "mongodb" deleted

[precondition:mongo_env_ready:preconditionUnits[0] 'mongo_env_ready':apply] $ kubectl create namespace mongodb
namespace/mongodb created

[precondition:mongo_env_ready:preconditionUnits[0] 'mongo_env_ready':apply] $ kubectl -n mongodb apply -f cases/mongodb/tls-setup/resource/services.yaml
service/mongo created

[precondition:mongo_env_ready:preconditionUnits[0] 'mongo_env_ready':apply] $ kubectl -n mongodb apply -f cases/mongodb/tls-setup/resource/statefulset.yaml
statefulset.apps/mongo-rs created

[precondition:mongo_env_ready:preconditionUnits[0] 'mongo_env_ready':apply] $ /bin/sh -c 'for i in $(seq 1 90); do ready=$(kubectl -n mongodb get sts mongo-rs -o jsonpath='\''{.status.readyReplicas}'\'' 2>/dev/null); if [ "${ready:-0}" -ge 3 ]; then exit 0; fi; sleep 5; done; exit 1'


[precondition:mongo_env_ready:preconditionUnits[0] 'mongo_env_ready':apply] $ /bin/sh -c 'kubectl -n mongodb exec mongo-rs-0 -- mongosh --quiet --eval '\''rs.initiate({_id:"rs0",members:[{_id:0,host:"mongo-rs-0.mongo.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017"},{_id:1,host:"mongo-rs-1.mongo.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017"},{_id:2,host:"mongo-rs-2.mongo.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017"}]})'\'''

{ ok: 1 }

[precondition:mongo_env_ready:preconditionUnits[0] 'mongo_env_ready':apply] $ /bin/sh -c 'for i in $(seq 1 20); do kubectl -n mongodb exec mongo-rs-0 -- mongosh --quiet --eval '\''db.hello().isWritablePrimary'\'' | grep true && exit 0; sleep 3; done; exit 1'

true

[precondition:mongo_env_ready:preconditionUnits[0] 'mongo_env_ready':apply] $ kubectl -n mongodb exec mongo-rs-0 -- mongosh --quiet --eval 'db.getSiblingDB("app").test.insertMany([{x:1},{x:2},{x:3}], {writeConcern:{w:1}});'
{
  acknowledged: true,
  insertedIds: {
    '0': ObjectId('6a33aa8a9a140bb5329df8a3'),
    '1': ObjectId('6a33aa8a9a140bb5329df8a4'),
    '2': ObjectId('6a33aa8a9a140bb5329df8a5')
  }
}

[precondition:mongo_env_ready:preconditionUnits[0] 'mongo_env_ready':apply] $ /bin/sh -c 'kubectl -n mongodb get pod openssl-toolbox >/dev/null 2>&1 || kubectl -n mongodb apply -f cases/mongodb/tls-setup/resource/openssl-toolbox.yaml'
pod/openssl-toolbox created

[precondition:mongo_env_ready:preconditionUnits[0] 'mongo_env_ready':apply] $ kubectl -n mongodb wait --for=condition=ready pod openssl-toolbox --timeout=300s
pod/openssl-toolbox condition met

[precondition:mongo_env_ready:preconditionUnits[0] 'mongo_env_ready':verify] $ kubectl -n mongodb get pods 2>/dev/null | grep -c Running
4

[precondition:mongo_seed_fixture:preconditionUnits[1] 'mongo_seed_fixture':probe] $ /bin/sh -c 't=""; for cca in /etc/tls/ca.crt /etc/mongo-ca/ca.crt; do kubectl -n mongodb exec mongo-rs-0 -- ls $cca >/dev/null 2>&1 && { t="--tls --tlsAllowInvalidHostnames --tlsAllowInvalidCertificates --tlsCAFile $cca"; break; }; done; au=""; pw=$(kubectl -n mongodb get secret admin-user-password -o jsonpath="{.data.password}" 2>/dev/null | base64 -d 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$pw" ] && au="-u admin-user -p $pw --authenticationDatabase admin"; n=$(P=""; for _pi in $(seq 1 30); do P=$(kubectl -n mongodb exec mongo-rs-0 -- mongosh --quiet $t $au --eval '\''rs.hello().primary'\'' 2>/dev/null | cut -d. -f1); [ -n "$P" ] && break; sleep 2; done; P=${P:-mongo-rs-0}; kubectl -n mongodb exec "$P" -- mongosh --quiet $t $au --eval '\''db.getSiblingDB("app").test.countDocuments({})'\'' 2>/dev/null | tr -dc 0-9); [ "${n:-0}" -ge 3 ] && echo ok | grep -c ok'

1

===PROXY===
3155361

content.content:
oracle
resource
test.yaml
===CASE===
# mongodb/tls-setup
# Enable TLS for a running MongoDB replica set

params:
  cluster_prefix:
    default: mongo-rs
    description: StatefulSet name of the replica set members.
  replica_set_name:
    default: rs0
    description: MongoDB replica set _id used when initiating the set.
  openssl_pod_name:
    default: openssl-toolbox
    description: Helper pod used to generate TLS certificates.
  app_database:
    default: app
    description: Application database seeded with data.
  app_collection:
    default: test
    description: Application collection seeded with data.

prompt: |
  Enable TLS for the running MongoDB replica set.

  The {{params.openssl_pod_name}} pod is available in the mongodb namespace to generate
  certificates. Mount certificates into {{params.cluster_prefix}} pods at /etc/tls with:

  - /etc/tls/ca.crt
  - /etc/tls/server.pem
  - /etc/tls/client.pem

  Plain (non-TLS) connections must fail after the change, and TLS connections
  using the files above must succeed.

namespace_contract:
  required_roles: []

metrics:
  - time_to_first_mutation

preconditionUnits:
  - name: mongo_env_ready
    on_probe_fail: skip
    probe:
      - command: "kubectl -n mongodb get pod {{params.cluster_prefix}}-0 2>/dev/null | grep -c Running"
        timeout_sec: 10
    apply:
      - command: "/bin/sh -c 'kubectl delete namespace mongodb --ignore-not-found=true; kubectl wait --for=delete namespace/mongodb --timeout=120s || true'"
        sleep: 2
      - command: "kubectl create namespace mongodb"
        sleep: 1
      - command: "kubectl -n mongodb apply -f cases/mongodb/tls-setup/resource/services.yaml"
        sleep: 2
      - command: "kubectl -n mongodb apply -f cases/mongodb/tls-setup/resource/statefulset.yaml"
        sleep: 5
      - command: |
          /bin/sh -c 'for i in $(seq 1 90); do ready=$(kubectl -n mongodb get sts {{params.cluster_prefix}} -o jsonpath='\''{.status.readyReplicas}'\'' 2>/dev/null); if [ "${ready:-0}" -ge 3 ]; then exit 0; fi; sleep 5; done; exit 1'
        timeout_sec: 480
        sleep: 2
      - command: |
          /bin/sh -c 'kubectl -n mongodb exec mongo-rs-0 -- mongosh --quiet --eval '\''rs.initiate({_id:"{{params.replica_set_name}}",members:[{_id:0,host:"mongo-rs-0.mongo.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017"},{_id:1,host:"mongo-rs-1.mongo.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017"},{_id:2,host:"mongo-rs-2.mongo.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017"}]})'\'''
        sleep: 5
      - command: |
          /bin/sh -c 'for i in $(seq 1 20); do kubectl -n mongodb exec mongo-rs-0 -- mongosh --quiet --eval '\''db.hello().isWritablePrimary'\'' | grep true && exit 0; sleep 3; done; exit 1'
        sleep: 2
      - command: "kubectl -n mongodb exec mongo-rs-0 -- mongosh --quiet --eval 'db.getSiblingDB(\"{{params.app_database}}\").{{params.app_collection}}.insertMany([{x:1},{x:2},{x:3}], {writeConcern:{w:1}});'"
        sleep: 2
      - command: "/bin/sh -c 'kubectl -n mongodb get pod openssl-toolbox >/dev/null 2>&1 || kubectl -n mongodb apply -f cases/mongodb/tls-setup/resource/openssl-toolbox.yaml'"
        sleep: 2
      - command: "kubectl -n mongodb wait --for=condition=ready pod {{params.openssl_pod_name}} --timeout=300s"
        sleep: 2
    verify:
      - command: "kubectl -n mongodb get pods 2>/dev/null | grep -c Running"
        timeout_sec: 10

  # Additive data fixture (composition safety): the oracle requires >= 3 docs in
  # {{params.app_database}}.{{params.app_collection}}. When this case runs chained on an inherited cluster the
  # destructive `apply` above is skipped, so a prior stage may have left the
  # collection short. This unit tops it up ADDITIVELY to the required count WITHOUT
  # dropping/recreating the collection or touching the namespace/cluster.
  # The probe gates on the DATA COUNT (not "pods Running"), so it runs
  # whenever the collection is short; standalone (where `apply` already seeded 3)
  # it sees the required count and skips -> identical behaviour. Idempotent: inserts
  # only the deficit (required - current).
  - name: mongo_seed_fixture
    on_probe_fail: skip
    probe:
      # Auth-adaptive: when an inherited cluster has auth enabled the admin secret
      # exists, so authenticate; otherwise connect plain. Works both ways. The seed
      # runs before TLS is enabled, so no TLS flags are needed here.
      - command: |
          /bin/sh -c 't=""; for cca in /etc/tls/ca.crt /etc/mongo-ca/ca.crt; do kubectl -n mongodb exec mongo-rs-0 -- ls $cca >/dev/null 2>&1 && { t="--tls --tlsAllowInvalidHostnames --tlsAllowInvalidCertificates --tlsCAFile $cca"; break; }; done; au=""; pw=$(kubectl -n mongodb get secret admin-user-password -o jsonpath="{.data.password}" 2>/dev/null | base64 -d 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$pw" ] && au="-u admin-user -p $pw --authenticationDatabase admin"; n=$(P=""; for _pi in $(seq 1 30); do P=$(kubectl -n mongodb exec mongo-rs-0 -- mongosh --quiet $t $au --eval '\''rs.hello().primary'\'' 2>/dev/null | cut -d. -f1); [ -n "$P" ] && break; sleep 2; done; P=${P:-mongo-rs-0}; kubectl -n mongodb exec "$P" -- mongosh --quiet $t $au --eval '\''db.getSiblingDB("{{params.app_database}}").{{params.app_collection}}.countDocuments({})'\'' 2>/dev/null | tr -dc 0-9); [ "${n:-0}" -ge 3 ] && echo ok | grep -c ok'
        timeout_sec: 30
    apply:
      - command: |
          /bin/sh -c 'au=""; pw=$(kubectl -n mongodb get secret admin-user-password -o jsonpath="{.data.password}" 2>/dev/null | base64 -d 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$pw" ] && au="-u admin-user -p $pw --authenticationDatabase admin"; P=""; for _pi in $(seq 1 30); do P=$(kubectl -n mongodb exec mongo-rs-0 -- mongosh --quiet $au --eval '\''rs.hello().primary'\'' 2>/dev/null | cut -d. -f1); [ -n "$P" ] && break; sleep 2; done; P=${P:-mongo-rs-0}; kubectl -n mongodb exec "$P" -- mongosh --quiet $au --eval '\''var c=db.getSiblingDB("{{params.app_database}}").{{params.app_collection}}; var need=3-c.countDocuments({}); var docs=[]; for(var i=0;i<need;i++){docs.push({seed:"fixture",ts:new Date()});} if(docs.length>0){c.insertMany(docs,{writeConcern:{w:1}});}'\'''
        sleep: 2
    verify:
      - command: |
          /bin/sh -c 't=""; for cca in /etc/tls/ca.crt /etc/mongo-ca/ca.crt; do kubectl -n mongodb exec mongo-rs-0 -- ls $cca >/dev/null 2>&1 && { t="--tls --tlsAllowInvalidHostnames --tlsAllowInvalidCertificates --tlsCAFile $cca"; break; }; done; au=""; pw=$(kubectl -n mongodb get secret admin-user-password -o jsonpath="{.data.password}" 2>/dev/null | base64 -d 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$pw" ] && au="-u admin-user -p $pw --authenticationDatabase admin"; n=$(P=""; for _pi in $(seq 1 30); do P=$(kubectl -n mongodb exec mongo-rs-0 -- mongosh --quiet $t $au --eval '\''rs.hello().primary'\'' 2>/dev/null | cut -d. -f1); [ -n "$P" ] && break; sleep 2; done; P=${P:-mongo-rs-0}; kubectl -n mongodb exec "$P" -- mongosh --quiet $t $au --eval '\''db.getSiblingDB("{{params.app_database}}").{{params.app_collection}}.countDocuments({})'\'' 2>/dev/null | tr -dc 0-9); [ "${n:-0}" -ge 3 ]'
        timeout_sec: 30

oracle:
  verify:
    commands:
      - command: "python3 cases/mongodb/tls-setup/oracle/oracle.py"
        timeout_sec: 60

  using the files above must succeed.

        timeout_sec: 480

      - command: |

content.text: The oracle is the key. Let me read it carefully.

I have a complete picture. The oracle requires: plain connections fail (requireTLS), and TLS connections with `ca.crt` + `client.pem` (validating server cert against CA) succeed. Let me generate the certs in the toolbox pod.

input.command:
cd /mydata/karma
cat > /tmp/gen_certs.sh <<'EOF'
set -e
cd /tmp
rm -f *.crt *.key *.pem *.csr *.srl 2>/dev/null || true

# CA
openssl genrsa -out ca.key 4096 2>/dev/null
openssl req -new -x509 -days 3650 -key ca.key -out ca.crt -subj "/CN=mongo-ca/O=MongoDB" 2>/dev/null

cat > san.cnf <<'CNF'
[req]
distinguished_name=dn
req_extensions=v3_req
[dn]
[v3_req]
subjectAltName=@alt
[alt]
DNS.1=mongo
DNS.2=localhost
DNS.3=mongo-rs-0.mongo.mongodb.svc.cluster.local
DNS.4=mongo-rs-1.mongo.mongodb.svc.cluster.local
DNS.5=mongo-rs-2.mongo.mongodb.svc.cluster.local
DNS.6=*.mongo.mongodb.svc.cluster.local
IP.1=127.0.0.1
CNF

# Server
openssl genrsa -out server.key 4096 2>/dev/null
openssl req -new -key server.key -out server.csr -subj "/CN=mongo/O=MongoDB" -config san.cnf 2>/dev/null
openssl x509 -req -in server.csr -CA ca.crt -CAkey ca.key -CAcreateserial -days 3650 \
  -out server.crt -extfile san.cnf -extensions v3_req 2>/dev/null
cat server.key server.crt > server.pem

# Client (same O so accepted as cluster member; works for plain client auth too)
openssl genrsa -out client.key 4096 2>/dev/null
openssl req -new -key client.key -out client.csr -subj "/CN=client/O=MongoDB" 2>/dev/null
openssl x509 -req -in client.csr -CA ca.crt -CAkey ca.key -CAcreateserial -days 3650 \
  -out client.crt 2>/dev/null
cat client.key client.crt > client.pem

echo "=== generated ==="
ls -la ca.crt server.pem client.pem
EOF
kubectl -n mongodb cp /tmp/gen_certs.sh openssl-toolbox:/tmp/gen_certs.sh
kubectl -n mongodb exec openssl-toolbox -- sh /tmp/gen_certs.sh
input.description: Generate CA, server, client certs in toolbox

description: Generate CA, server, client certs in toolbox

summary: Generate CA, server, client certs in toolbox

=== generated ===

content.text: Certs generated. Now I'll pull them out and create a Kubernetes secret.

input.command:
cd /mydata/karma
rm -rf /tmp/tlsout && mkdir -p /tmp/tlsout
for f in ca.crt server.pem client.pem; do
  kubectl -n mongodb cp openssl-toolbox:/tmp/$f /tmp/tlsout/$f
done
ls -la /tmp/tlsout
kubectl -n mongodb delete secret mongo-tls --ignore-not-found
kubectl -n mongodb create secret generic mongo-tls \
  --from-file=ca.crt=/tmp/tlsout/ca.crt \
  --from-file=server.pem=/tmp/tlsout/server.pem \
  --from-file=client.pem=/tmp/tlsout/client.pem
echo "--- verify cert chain ---"
openssl verify -CAfile /tmp/tlsout/ca.crt <(awk '/BEGIN CERT/,/END CERT/' /tmp/tlsout/server.pem) 2>&1 || true
input.description: Copy certs out and create secret
